about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: DK Techno - your path to adventure
about.story_text: DK Techno was founded with one goal - to make world-class powersports vehicles accessible to Russian outdoor enthusiasts. We are an authorized dealer of BRP and Polaris, offering a full range of services from new vehicle sales to professional service maintenance.
about.mission_text: We believe everyone deserves the opportunity to experience real adventures. Our team of professionals will help you find the vehicle that is perfect for you.

rental.subtitle: Experience BRP and Polaris without buying
rental.booking_success: Request submitted! We will contact you shortly.
rental.condition_2: Valid driver's license (category A or B) required
rental.condition_3: Deposit is paid before receiving the vehicle
rental.condition_4: Full insurance is included in the rental price
rental.condition_5: Vehicle delivery in Moscow region — from 3,000 ₽
rental.condition_7: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before

service.title: Service & Maintenance
service.subtitle: Professional care for your vehicle
service.s1_desc: Full computer diagnostics for BRP and Polaris vehicles. Fault detection and repair recommendations.
service.s2_desc: Routine maintenance per manufacturer guidelines. Oil and filter changes, full system inspection.
service.s3_desc: Major and minor repairs for Rotax and ProStar engines. Genuine OEM parts.
service.s4_desc: Suspension, transmission, and brake system repair and replacement. Alignment and tuning.
service.s5_desc: Authorized warranty service for BRP and Polaris. All warranty repairs are free of charge.
service.s6_desc: Genuine BRP and Polaris parts available to order. Nationwide delivery across Russia.
